* the program should fetch 100 records from a database and then update each record with web service data  
* the first approach uses threads to handle each web service request independently  
* the second approach divides the records into batches of 10 and processes each batch on a separate thread  
* the first approach may lead to higher resource usage due to more threads  
* the second approach may improve throughput by reducing thread contention  
* the first approach may introduce latency due to thread synchronization  
* the second approach may reduce latency by processing batches in parallel  
* the first approach may be more flexible for dynamic thread counts  
* the second approach may be more efficient for predictable workloads
